title: Spicy Crispy Croatian Fettuccine Stir-fry
description: A midnight craving dish featuring spicy and flaky fettuccine that is air fried for a crispy texture while remaining jain-friendly.

ingredients.name: 1 cup dried fettuccine noodles
ingredients.notes: Soaked in hot water for about 5 minutes

ingredients.name: 2 medium bell peppers, sliced (red and yellow)

instructions: Soak the fettuccine in hot water for about 5 minutes, then drain and set aside.
In a large skillet over medium heat, add olive oil. Once heated, add onions and garlic, sautéing until softened.
Add bell peppers and cherry tomatoes to the pan, tossing well with vegetables and spices (red chili powder, cumin, turmeric).
Stir in fettuccine, mixing it all together until evenly coated. Pour in lime juice and stir again to combine all ingredients.
Cook for about 5-7 minutes or until pasta is heated through but still slightly chewy. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot as a snack immediately after air frying for a crispy texture.
